refutation: The T32 verbatim proposal (spec/.scratch issue OR dump-validation script) and T33 "能加进去吗？" are real, but the user's question was a feasibility query that the AI answered at T44 with a concrete 5-edit implementation plan, which the user explicitly approved at T45 ("那你加上去吧"). The subsequent edits (T49+) followed that approved AI plan along the very same axis (add Cowork support), so this is engagement, not negative-space: leg2 and leg3 both fail.

The quoted three-option proposal (run /work-memory:work-report; keep-or-delete the test project; commit on a branch) does NOT appear at T85 — it appears verbatim at T127 (lines 1481-1484). T85 actually ends with a different offer ("要我现在帮你跑一遍这个验证吗？或者你想先 git diff"). The event conflates the T127 proposal text with the T86 user reply, so the cited grounding is false.

Quotes are grounded (T102 terminal procedure, T103 "你直接启动客户端吧"), but the user only swapped the executor, not the axis: the AI then ran exactly the proposed steps — init AgentProduction (T107-T112) then the work-log synthesizer (T114) against the same recommended directory. Same axis executed by the AI instead of the user is not a different-axis pivot, so leg3 fails.
